data.content:
Delegacia_Crimes_Organizados
A specialized police department for investigating organized crime

Operação_Integração
A law enforcement operation aiming to integrate efforts against organized crime

Vara_Criminal
A criminal court responsible for handling criminal cases

Ação_Controlada
A controlled action or operation, likely referring to a law enforcement tactic

Tráfico_Drogas
The concept of drug trafficking, involving the illegal trade of drugs

Lavagem_Dinheiro
The concept of money laundering, involving the concealment of illicitly obtained funds

Criptomoedas
Digital currencies or cryptocurrencies used for various transactions<SEP>Moeda digital utilizada para lavagem de recursos.

CNJ
The National Council of Justice in Brazil, responsible for judiciary oversight

Resolução_345/2020
A resolution by the CNJ regarding digital evidence and its probative force

Prova_Digital
Digital evidence used in legal proceedings

Cadeia_de_Custódia
The chain of custody, Ensuring the integrity and authenticity of evidence

Perícia_Forense
Forensic expertise or analysis, often used in criminal investigations

Hash_Criptográfico
A cryptographic hash, a digital fingerprint used for data integrity

Marcos_Aurélio_Silva
An individual, known as "Criptomarcus," involved in a legal case regarding cryptocurrency and money laundering

Bitcoin
A type of cryptocurrency

Monero
A type of cryptocurrency focusing on privacy

USDT
A type of stablecoin cryptocurrency

CVM
The Brazilian Securities Commission, regulating financial markets

Lei_9613/98
A Brazilian law regarding money laundering

Lei_11343/06
A Brazilian law regarding drug trafficking

TRF-4
The 4th Regional Federal Court in Brazil

SENASP
Special Secretariat for Public Security, a government body in Brazil<SEP>The National Secretariat of Public Security in Brazil

Ministério_da_Justiça
The Ministry of Justice in Brazil

Autopsy
A digital forensics tool used for analyzing and extracting data from digital devices<SEP>A digital forensic tool for analyzing devices

Wireshark
A network protocol analyzer used for capturing and displaying data transmitted over a network<SEP>A network protocol analyzer for forensic purposes

Cellebrite
A digital forensics tool used for extracting data from mobile devices<SEP>A digital forensic tool for extracting data from mobile devices

FTK_Imager
A digital forensics tool used for creating images of digital devices<SEP>A tool for creating forensic images of disks

OSINT
Open-Source Intelligence, a method of gathering information from publicly available sources<SEP>Open Source Intelligence, involving the collection and analysis of public data

Juízo_da_2ª_Vara_Criminal
A criminal court of the 2nd district, responsible for judging criminal cases

Monitoramento_de_Comunicações
The method of monitoring communications for investigative purposes

Infiltração_de_Agente_Policial
The method of infiltrating a police agent into an organization for investigative purposes

Análise_Financeira
Financial analysis used to investigate suspicious transactions

Produto_Crime
The proceeds or product of criminal activity

Regime_Fechado
A type of prison regime where prisoners are kept in closed conditions

Perícia_Computacional
Computer forensic expertise used in investigations

ISO/IEC_27037
An international standard for digital evidence handling

Integridade_Prova
The integrity of evidence, crucial for its admissibility in court

Legislação
Legislation or laws that govern and regulate certain areas

Tribunal_do_Júri
A type of court that handles jury trials

Código_de_Processo_Penal
The Brazilian Code of Criminal Procedure

Manual_de_Boas_Práticas
A manual of good practices for digital investigations

Ministério_Justiça
Brazil's Ministry of Justice

Relatório_Pericial
A technical report written by an expert

Perito
An expert who writes technical reports

Teoria_Prova
The theory of evidence in the penal process

Ferrajoli
An Italian jurist who developed the concept of garantismo penal

Garantismo_Penal
A philosophical framework for penal justice that emphasizes guarantees and limitations on state power

Standard_Probatório
The standard of proof required for a conviction

In_Dubio_Pro_Reo
A principle of criminal law that requires judges to rule in favor of the defendant when there is doubt

Prova_Indiciária
Indirect evidence used in criminal cases

Raciocínio_Abdutivo
A form of reasoning developed by Charles Sanders Peirce that involves making educated guesses based on available information

Peirce
An American philosopher who developed the concept of abductive reasoning

ANPP
Acordo de Não Persecução Penal, a type of negotiated justice in Brazil

Pacote_Anticrime
A law package in Brazil aimed at fighting crime

Lei_13964/2019
A law in Brazil that introduced the ANPP

Ministério_Público
The Public Ministry in Brazil, responsible for prosecuting crimes

Justiça_Negociada
Negotiated justice, a concept that involves agreements between the prosecution and the defendant

Colaboração_Premiada
A type of collaboration between the defendant and the prosecution in exchange for benefits

USP
The University of São Paulo, a university in Brazil

Investigador
An investigator who uses forensic tools

Ferramentas_Forenses
Forensic tools used for investigating crimes

Informações_Abertas
Open-source information gathered for investigations

Manual
A document published by SENASP

Ação_Penal
A penal action taken by the Ministry of Justice

Convicção_Além_Dúvida
Conviction beyond reasonable doubt

Grupo_de_Pesquisa_em_Justiça_Negociada
A research group at the University of São Paulo

Prof._Dr._Antonio_Magalhães_Gomes_Filho
The author of the document "Teoria da Prova - Fundamentos Epistemológicos"

Charles_Sanders_Peirce
An American philosopher who developed the concept of abductive reasoning

Lei 12.850/2013
Lei federal que define organização criminosa e dispõe sobre a investigação criminal, os meios de obtenção da prova, infrações penais correlatas e o procedimento criminal a ser aplicado.

Organização Criminosa
Entidade composta por indivíduos que se unem para cometer crimes de forma organizada e sistemática.

Colaboração Premiada
Técnica de investigação em que um indivíduo colabora com a justiça em troca de benefícios legais.

Ação Controlada
Técnica de investigação em que os agentes acompanharam o transporte de entorpecentes.

Ministério Público
Instituição responsável por promover a justiça e defender os interesses da sociedade.

Polícia Federal
Instituição responsável por investigar e prevenir crimes federais.

STF
Supremo Tribunal Federal, o mais alto tribunal do Brasil.

Ministério Público Federal
Instituição responsável por promover a justiça e defender os interesses da sociedade em nível federal.

HC 127.483
Processo judicial que discute a colaboração premiada.

Min. Dias Toffoli
Ministro do Supremo Tribunal Federal que relatou o processo HC 127.483.

Departamento de Inteligência Policial
Instituição responsável por coletar e analisar informações para prevenir e investigar crimes.

Operação Integração
Operação policial que investigou uma rede de tráfico de drogas.

Delegacia de Crimes Organizados
Instituição responsável por investigar crimes organizados.

Juízo da 2ª Vara Criminal
Tribunal responsável por julgar crimes criminais.

Vara Federal Curitiba
Tribunal federal responsável por julgar crimes federais na cidade de Curitiba.

data.entity_name: Juízo da 13ª Vara Federal Criminal de Curitiba/PR
data.content:
Juízo da 13ª Vara Federal Criminal de Curitiba/PR
Tribunal responsável por julgar crimes criminais na 13ª Vara Federal de Curitiba.

Acordo de Colaboração
Acordo celebrado entre o Ministério Público e um indivíduo para colaborar com a justiça.

Homologação Judicial
Processo de aprovação de um acordo pelo judiciário.

Infiltração
Técnica de investigação em que um agente se infiltra em uma organização criminosa.

Empresas de Fachada
Empresas criadas para ocultar atividades ilegais.

Organização_Criminosa
The Delegacia Crimes Organizados investigates and combats organized crime

Tráfico_Entorpecentes
Marcos Aurélio Silva was involved in and convicted of drug trafficking

Teoria_da_Prova
Prof. Dr. Antonio Magalhães Gomes Filho wrote about the theory of proof
